data.description:
Description:
Premium  plots available under Greater Warangal Municipal Corporation limits, approved by KUDA.  

Highlights:
- Close proximity to Kazipet Railway Station (1 km).  
- Near prestigious institutions: Talla Padmavathi Engineering College & Kakatiya University (1 km).  
- Within walking distance to schools and engineering colleges.  
- Convenient access to Sainik School, NIIT, Warangal, and IT hub.  
- Adjacent to National Highway 163 and key urban locations.  

Features:
- 100% Vastu-compliant plots.  
- Plot sizes: 33x60, 40x60, 45x60, and 30x60.  
- 30–150 ft wide CC roads.  
- Avenue plantation with drip irrigation.  
- Underground drainage, overhead water tanks (4 lakh liters capacity).  
- Parks, lawns, flower plantations, walking tracks, gym center, and children’s gaming zone.  
- Compound wall with solar fencing for security.  

Additional Information:  
- Bank loans available.  
- TS RERA
- Contact for more details or to schedule a site visit.  

Price: 13000/-

Location:kazipet mandal , hanumakonda district 

Call now to own your dream plot!
data.title: Residential Plots for Sale in Greater Warangal | KUDA Approved
